claims.summary: Semantic stale duration is fill-shaped rather than a single fixed timeout.
claims.disposition: verify sigmoid and alternate-shape source plus exact formula tests

claims.summary: Recovery handover should decrease monotonically instead of oscillating around the boundary.
claims.disposition: verify monotonic recovery and 0.35-to-0.45 release regressions

claims.summary: Adjacent fill changes need a bounded stale-window step so smooth math does not hide micro-stutter.
claims.disposition: verify one-percent sweep and adjacent-step caps

claims.summary: Shadow response and stale-semantic release should be compared as separate influences.
claims.disposition: route a bounded offline same-input comparison using existing telemetry without sending new semantic content

claims.summary: Changing stale thresholds, pulse caps, decay, or sensory cadence would alter live sensory regulation.
claims.disposition: retain as Tier 5 Mike/operator approval work with bounded canary, abort, and felt-response evidence
